issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases for async selectors and atom families.

scenarios.name: Todo filter with independent re-renders
scenarios.rationale: Baseline uses Context which re-renders everything together; treatment splits state into todosAtom + filterAtom, derives filteredTodos and todoStats selectors, and uses useRecoilValue vs useRecoilState to scope subscriptions.

scenarios.name: Async user profile with Suspense
scenarios.rationale: Baseline manages loading flags manually with useState/useEffect; treatment uses a selectorFamily async get, reads via useRecoilValue, and wraps the consumer in Suspense for native loading integration.
